input_content: [PATIENT], 74-year-old female, presenting with acute altered mental status and fever of 39.4C. Urinalysis positive for nitrites and leukocyte esterase. History of recurrent UTIs, type 2 diabetes, and CKD stage 3. Current medications: metformin 500mg BID, lisinopril 5mg daily. Please assess ESI acuity.
